title: The Jumper
description: This mod adds to game a Jumper drink, you can craft a green jumper with apple and luck potion on breewing stand, and can craft a red jumper with sweet berries and green jumper
body:
This mod adds to game a Jumper drink, you can craft a green jumper with apple and luck potion on breewing stand, and can craft a red jumper with sweet berries and green jumper

I'm add a other Jumper drinks to the mod later

FAQ
==
Q: I'm can use this mod to modpacks?
A: Yes

Q: You drink this drink on real life?
A: Yes, it's my favourite drink
